setup: if [ -f "$PASEO_SOURCE_CHECKOUT_PATH/packages/server/.env" ]; then cp "$PASEO_SOURCE_CHECKOUT_PATH/packages/server/.env" "$PASEO_WORKTREE_PATH/packages/server/.env"; elif [ -f "$PASEO_SOURCE_CHECKOUT_PATH/packages/server/.env.example" ]; then cp "$PASEO_SOURCE_CHECKOUT_PATH/packages/server/.env.example" "$PASEO_WORKTREE_PATH/packages/server/.env"; fi

terminals.name: dev
terminals.command: SESSION_NAME="${PWD##*/}"; if ! tmux has-session -t "$SESSION_NAME" 2>/dev/null; then tmux new-session -d -s "$SESSION_NAME" -c "$PWD" "npm run dev"; fi
